Localization.Description: A user created, modified, or removed a user, or a user locked or unlocked a user account

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} locked the user account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the parameter "{object.property}" of the user {object.account.name} to "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} unlocked the user account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
